nasb.text: Abraham was the father of Isaac, Isaac the father of Jacob, and Jacob the father of Judah and his brothers.

esv.text: Abraham was the father of Isaac, and Isaac the father of Jacob, and Jacob the father of Judah and his brothers,

cnv.text: 亞伯拉罕生以撒，以撒生雅各，雅各生猶大和他的兄弟，

ccb.text: 亚伯拉罕生以撒， 以撒生雅各， 雅各生犹大和他的兄弟，

csbs.text: 亚伯拉罕生以撒， 以撒生雅各， 雅各生犹大和他的兄弟们，
